title: Pleated Bird's Nest Fern - Crispy Wave - Asplenium Nidus in a 12cm Pot
features: A handsome fern with lance shaped fronds with ruffled edges which overlap to create a nest in the centre where the new growth emerge.
It will enjoy being placed in a bathroom as the humidity naturally created will do wonders for its fronds.
Remove any dead leaves to keep it looking healthy.
Supplied in a 12cm Nursery Pot and approximately 20-30 cm high
